abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Replacement Parts
abilities.text: During the end phase, this model may discard a card to heal 2.

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.text: This model ignores the (U) abilities of other models.

actions.name: Rain of Pork
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may select another friendly non-unique model within 2" when this action is declared. If a friendly model was selected, this action deals +1 damage and the selected model is placed into base contact with the target, and is then dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: "Here Piggy, Piggy..."
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target friendly Sz 1 or 2 model. Place the target into base contact with this model.

triggers.name: "You'll Get a Tasty Treat..."
triggers.text: Once per activation. The target heals 3.

actions.name: "Heave Ho!"
actions.effects: Remove a marker within 3". Make a copy of the marker, controlled by the same player, within range.

triggers.name: "Looks Edible?"
triggers.text: Once per turn. Draw a card.
